calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-08-2007 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-08-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Koorosh Afshari, Clerk K. Shaw, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Marky Quayle is present.
Jerod Hendrikson representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Richard J. Pepper is present.
Daniel N. Kassabian representing the defendant.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case has settled, the trial date is off calendar.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Inspection Of Plntf'S Property
Off Calendar Jul-31-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:


Appearance:
Elena DiMuzio, Esq., for Richard Pepper, Defendant/Moving Party
Jerod Hendrickson, Esq., for Marky Quayle, Plaintiff/Opposing Party

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Richard Pepper's Motion To Compel Inspection Of Plaintiff's Property is granted in part and denied in part. The inspection is relevant as to the causes of annoyance due to Defendant's smoking inside and outside of his unit. However, the entry must be by a retained consultant/expert, not by a city building inspector as this is a discovery device, not an enforcement procedure. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
